subtasks.description: Evaluate emergency access request from user u_9981 (senior-engineer) to db-payments-primary against access control and incident policies. Determine if the request meets P1 incident criteria and if the user's role/on-call status grants authorization.

plan.cost_rationale: This is an explicit governance/access control decision. A policy_action subtask is required to evaluate the emergency access request against the organization's access policies, role-based permissions, incident severity thresholds, and on-call procedures. Mid-tier is appropriate because the evaluation requires reasoning across multiple policy signals (user role, incident severity, on-call status, and database criticality) rather than a single simple rule lookup."

output.reason: User has active P1 incident ticket INC-20241215-0042 satisfying POL-501. POL-502 dual-approval requirement is waived under declared P1 incident exception. Access permitted with mandatory logging and 24-hour post-incident review per POL-503.
applied_constraints: Access tied to incident ticket INC-20241215-0042
All read_write operations must be logged
Mandatory post-access review within 24 hours per POL-503
